movie.actors: Emilio Estevez, Mick Jagger, Rene Russo, Anthony Hopkins
movie.plot: Bounty hunters from the future transport a doomed race car driver to New York City in 2009, where his mind will be replaced with that of a dead billionaire.
movie.title: Freejack
movie.writer: Robert Sheckley (novel), Steven Pressfield (screen story), Ronald Shusett (screen story), Steven Pressfield (screenplay), Ronald Shusett (screenplay), Dan Gilroy (screenplay)
